old_value: {"id":"broadside-kv75.3","title":"MEDIUM: Unbounded response body reads before size check","description":"Files: actor_cache.rs:63-72, feed.rs:31-37, media.rs:62-83. These locations read entire HTTP response bodies into memory via resp.bytes().await before checking size limits. A malicious or misconfigured server could send large responses causing memory pressure. actor_cache has a post-read 64KB check, media has a Content-Length pre-check but still reads full body if Content-Length is absent, feed has no size limit at all. Fix: check Content-Length first (when available), then stream body with a running byte counter and bail when limit exceeded.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:35.842466931Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:35.842466931Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-kv75.3","depends_on_id":"broadside-kv75","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:35.853319466Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added Content-Length pre-check to actor_cache.rs. Added 5MB size limit with Content-Length pre-check to feed.rs. media.rs already had Content-Length pre-check.
